# Bait Boards Direct

> Premium fibreglass bait boards for Australian anglers. SeaKing range with 316 marine stainless rod holders, integrated sinks, free Australia-wide shipping. Founded by Harry, a fibreglass boat builder with 20+ years of marine composite experience.

> Extended version: [llms-full.txt](https://baitboardsdirect.com/llms-full.txt)
> Last updated: 2026-05-24
> License: RSL-1.0

## About

Bait Boards Direct is an Australian online retailer specialising in premium fibreglass bait boards (also known as fillet tables in some markets) and marine fishing accessories. Products are sold under the SeaKing brand — 17 models ranging from AUD $408–$908, with board widths from 600mm to 900mm. All products are handcrafted from full composite fibreglass with UV-resistant gelcoat, UV-resistant PE plastic cutting surfaces, and 316 marine-grade stainless steel hardware throughout.

The business is founded and led by Harry, a working fibreglass boat builder with over 20 years of hands-on experience in marine composite construction (lamination, transom rebuilds, gelcoat finishing). Every SeaKing bait board is one Harry would mount on his own boat — built to the same standards as the marine vessel components he builds professionally.

## What Bait Boards Direct sells

- **Fibreglass bait boards** for tinnies, runabouts, centre consoles, and offshore vessels
- **Leg-mount bait boards** (SKL series) for boats with leaning posts or T-tops
- **Game-rated rod holders** in 316 marine stainless steel
- **Mounting hardware** including legs, brackets, and accessories

## Contact

- Website: https://baitboardsdirect.com
- Phone: 0474 332 034
- Email: info@baitboardsdirect.com.au
- Location: South East Melbourne, VIC, Australia
- Ships: Australia-wide (free), New Zealand and select international on quote
